zh.lifeSummary: Mats Gustavsson Sparre是Gustav的兒子，出生在瑞典。他於1379年3月27日與Birgitta Magnusdotter在瑞典結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1419年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mats Gustavsson Sparre是Gustav的儿子，出生在瑞典。他于1379年3月27日与Birgitta Magnusdotter在瑞典结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1419年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Gustavsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Gustav, which is most likely of Slavic origin, a derivative of the name Gostislav ‘glorious guest’, a compound of Old Slavic gostь ‘guest’ + the element slav ‘glory’ or ‘famous’ (from Old Slavic slava ‘glory’). Alternatively, the name could be of Old Swedish origin, possibly derived from the Old Norse elements Gotar ‘Goths’ and stafr ‘staff’, hence meaning ‘staff of the Goths’. The name Gustav has been borne by eight kings of Sweden. Compare Gustafsson and Gustavson .

variants.name: Gustaveson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish   Gustavsson   and of its Scandinavian cognates (see   Gustafson  ). Compare   Gustavson  .

variants.name: Gustavsen
meanings: Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name Gustav (see Gustavsson ). Compare Gustafson and Gustavson .

variants.name: Gustason
meanings: American shortened form of Swedish   Gustavsson   or   Gustafsson   and, in some cases, a shortened and altered form of its Danish and Norwegian cognates (see   Gustafson  ).

variants.name: Gustafsson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lars, Per, Erik, Mats, Anders, Bjorn, Lennart, Niklas, Nils, Ragner, Sig.  German Hans, Ulrika.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Gustaf, a variant of Gustav (see Gustavsson ). Compare Gustafson .

variants.name: Gustave
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Dieudonne, Fernand, Luckner, Pierre.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the French personal name Gustave, of Scandinavian origin (see Gustavsson ). This surname was brought to the US mostly from Haiti, where it is most common.

variants.name: Gustavson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nils, Sten, Bernt, Erik, Sven, Aksel, Evald, Gunner, Lars, Owe, Ragner.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Gustavsson  . This is also an Americanized form of its Norwegian and Danish cognates (see   Gustafson  ). Compare   Gustaveson  .

nameMeanings.name: Mats
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: The Hatuna Games
historicEvents.description: A conflict on September 29, 1306, between Birger, King of Sweden, and his brothers, the dukes Eric Magnusson and Valdemar Magnusson is known as The Hatuna Games. The brothers arrived to a party late in the night at King Birger's estate. The dukes captured and imprisoned Birger and his wife in Nykoping Castle's dungeon. Duke Eric then gained power over Sweden.
Black Death killed one-third of population.

en.lifeSummary: Mats Gustavsson Sparre was born in Sweden as the son of Gustav. He married Birgitta Magnusdotter on 27 March 1379, in Sweden. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1419, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mats Gustavsson Sparre est né à Suède, fils de Gustav. Il a épousé Birgitta Magnusdotter le 27 mars 1379, à Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1419, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Mats Gustavsson Sparre wurde in Schweden, als Sohn von Gustav geboren. Er hat am 27. März 1379 in Schweden Birgitta Magnusdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1419 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mats Gustavsson Sparre è nato il nel Svezia come figlio di Gustav. Lui sposato Birgitta Magnusdotter il 27 marzo 1379, nel Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1419, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Mats Gustavsson SparreはスウェーデンでGustavの息子として生まれた。1379年3月27日にスウェーデンでBirgitta Magnusdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1419年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mats Gustavsson Sparre(은)는 스웨덴에서 Gustav의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1379년 3월 27일 스웨덴에서 Birgitta Magnusdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1419년 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mats Gustavsson Sparre nasceu em Suécia filho de Gustav. Ele casou-se com Birgitta Magnusdotter em 27 de março de 1379, em Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1419, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Mats Gustavsson Sparre родился в местности Швеция. Его отца звали Gustav. Он женился на женщине по имени Birgitta Magnusdotter 27 марта 1379 г. в местности Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1419 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Mats Gustavsson Sparre nació en Suecia como hijo de Gustav. Se casó con Birgitta Magnusdotter el 27 de marzo de 1379, en Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1419, en su pueblo.

th.–Male: ถึงแก่กรรม
